synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1827 Oracle Linux 10 zlib-ng bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1827
description:
[2.2.3-1]
- Enable DFLTCC on s390x
- Resolves: RHEL-135504
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1827

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1827.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
zlib-ng-2.2.3-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
zlib-ng-compat-2.2.3-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
zlib-ng-compat-devel-2.2.3-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
zlib-ng-compat-static-2.2.3-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
zlib-ng-devel-2.2.3-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
zlib-ng-2.2.3-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
zlib-ng-compat-2.2.3-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
zlib-ng-compat-devel-2.2.3-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
zlib-ng-compat-static-2.2.3-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
zlib-ng-devel-2.2.3-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/zlib-ng-2.2.3-3.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.2.3-1]
- Enable DFLTCC on s390x
- Resolves: RHEL-135504
